title: Hands-On with Kairos - Edge Kubernetes Made Simple

resources.evidence_quote: So for anyone who wants to learn more, you can go to kairos.io.

resources.evidence_quote: And there is a quick start guide, which on Rawkode Live is my favorite button because that's where we wanna show how to get started with the project.

resources.evidence_quote: And we have a community bundles repository where community can contribute new bundles,

resources.title: Lennart Poettering article about fitting systemd technologies into an ideal Linux distribution
resources.evidence_quote: you know, Leonard Potter rings article that he wrote many years now, but fitting all of this together to build, like, the ideal Linux distribution.
